hub_subtitle: Business English for global coffee trading

lesson.menu_title: Talking About Your Day -- Present Continuous
lesson.menu_desc: Actions in progress at work -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 7 -- Present Continuous for Actions in Progress and Work Routines
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernanda Gabriela Silva Rodrigues | Aula 7 -- Talking About Your Day

listenings.text: Hi Fernanda, this is a quick voice note from Daniel. I am calling about the weekly update. Right now, the logistics team is reviewing the shipment documents. I am still waiting for the prices from the supplier. We are not closing the contract today. I am attending a meeting at three. Please send me your status when you can. Thank you, and talk soon.

Hi, this is Fernanda with my status update. Right now, I am reviewing the new contract. I am coordinating with the export team in Vietnam. We are still waiting for confirmation from the supplier. I am updating the spreadsheet today, and I am following up on two emails. I am not attending the afternoon call. I will send the full report tomorrow. Thank you.

extra_audio.text: Fernanda starts her status update. She says she is reviewing the new contract. She is coordinating with the export team. She is still waiting for confirmation. She is updating the spreadsheet today.
